mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_run (run_id, parent_run_id, root_run_id, request_id, conversation_id, agent_role, run_kind, depth, child_ordinal, question, workspace, status, current_node, step, checkpoint_version, summary_json, blocked_reason, used_tokens, estimated_cost) VALUES (#{runId}, #{parentRunId}, #{rootRunId}, #{requestId}, #{conversationId}, #{agentRole}, #{runKind}, #{depth}, #{childOrdinal}, #{question}, #{workspace}, #{status}, #{currentNode}, #{step}, #{checkpointVersion}, #{summaryJson}, #{blockedReason}, #{usedTokens}, #{estimatedCost}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE parent_run_id = VALUES(parent_run_id), root_run_id = VALUES(root_run_id), request_id = VALUES(request_id), conversation_id = VALUES(conversation_id), agent_role = VALUES(agent_role), run_kind = VALUES(run_kind), depth = VALUES(depth), child_ordinal = VALUES(child_ordinal), question = VALUES(question), workspace = VALUES(workspace), status = VALUES(status), current_node = VALUES(current_node), step = VALUES(step), checkpoint_version = VALUES(checkpoint_version), summary_json = VALUES(summary_json), blocked_reason = VALUES(blocked_reason), used_tokens = VALUES(used_tokens), estimated_cost = VALUES(estimated_cost), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_run WHERE run_id = #{runId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM agent_run WHERE parent_run_id = #{parentRunId} ORDER BY child_ordinal ASC, create_time ASC
